description: Navigate to http://localhost:8080/story.html in Firefox. This page contains a classic short story, but it is cluttered with distracting sidebars and advertisements. Activate Firefox's 'Reader View' for this page to strip away the ads and navigation menus. Once Reader View is active and only the clean story is visible, use Firefox's Print feature to save the clean page as a PDF. Save the PDF exactly to: ~/Documents/clean_story.pdf

metadata.core_text_snippet: dreadfully nervous I had been and am
